`timescale 1ns / 1ps



module spi (
    input wire n_rst,
    input wire clk,
    input wire ren,
    input wire [2:0] raddr,
    output reg [7:0] rdata,
    input wire wen,
    input wire [2:0] waddr,
    input wire [7:0] wdata,

    output reg phymosi,
    output reg physck
);

reg [3:0] cnt;
reg [7:0] bufout;
reg [7:0] bufin;

        end
        
        endcase
    end

    end

    end

    if (!n_rst) begin
        cnt <= 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
